title: Senior Software Engineer – Backend
description:
Infosys is looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Cloud Platform team in Pune. You will design and build scalable microservices using Python and Go, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and participate in code reviews.

Requirements:
- 4+ years of backend development experience
- Proficiency in Python or Go
- Experience with AWS, Kubernetes, and Docker
- Strong understanding of REST APIs and gRPC
- B.Tech / M.Tech in Computer Science or related field

Benefits: Medical insurance, 30 days PTO, ESOPs, flexible work-from-home policy.
Apply at: careers.infosys.com | hr.pune@infosys.com

title: Data Analyst – Growth Analytics
description:
Swiggy's Growth Analytics team is hiring a Data Analyst to derive insights that drive user acquisition and retention strategies.

What you'll do:
- Build dashboards using Tableau and Metabase
- Write complex SQL queries against our Redshift warehouse
- Partner with product and marketing on A/B test design
- Present findings to senior leadership weekly

What we need:
- 2+ years in analytics or data science
- Expert SQL skills; Python (pandas) is a plus
- Experience with BI tools
- Strong communication skills

CTC: ₹10–16 LPA + performance bonus
Apply via LinkedIn or talent@swiggy.in

title: Product Manager – Fintech
description:
Razorpay is seeking an experienced Product Manager to lead our Payment Gateway product line. You will own the roadmap, write PRDs, and work with engineering and design to ship features that serve 8M+ businesses.

Responsibilities:
- Define and prioritize product roadmap based on data and customer feedback
- Coordinate with compliance, risk, and engineering teams
- Drive 0-to-1 feature launches end-to-end

Requirements:
- 4–7 years of product management experience
- Deep understanding of payments, UPI, or fintech ecosystem
- MBA / B.Tech from a top-tier institute preferred

Compensation: ₹25–40 LPA + ESOPs
Contact: careers@razorpay.com | razorpay.com/careers

title: HR Executive – Talent Acquisition
description:
Wipro Technologies is hiring an HR Executive for Talent Acquisition to support end-to-end recruitment across IT and non-IT roles.

Key Responsibilities:
- Source candidates through job portals, LinkedIn, and referrals
- Coordinate interviews with hiring managers
- Manage offer letters and onboarding
- Maintain MIS reports using Excel

Eligibility:
- MBA in HR or equivalent
- 1–3 years of recruitment experience
- Good communication skills in English and Telugu

Salary: ₹4–6 LPA + PF + Health Insurance
Email CV to: talent.hyd@wipro.com

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Freshworks is looking for a DevOps Engineer to strengthen our infrastructure reliability and CI/CD pipelines for SaaS products serving global customers.

Responsibilities:
- Manage and scale AWS infrastructure using Terraform
- Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions)
- Implement observability using Datadog and PagerDuty
- Collaborate with development teams on release management

Requirements:
- 3+ years in DevOps/SRE roles
- Strong AWS, Linux, Kubernetes skills
- Scripting in Bash or Python

Package: ₹12–22 LPA + Stock options
Apply: jobs.freshworks.com

title: Content Writer – B2B SaaS
description:
Zoho Corporation is looking for a Content Writer to create long-form blog posts, whitepapers, and case studies for our CRM and marketing automation products.

Responsibilities:
- Write 2–3 SEO-optimized articles per week
- Research industry trends and translate them into reader-friendly content
- Collaborate with product marketing on campaign assets

Requirements:
- 2+ years of B2B content writing experience
- Familiarity with SEO tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush)
- Excellent written English

CTC: ₹5–9 LPA
Apply at: zoho.com/careers or content-hiring@zoho.com

Infosys is looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Cloud Platform team in Pune. You will design and build scalable microservices using Python and Go, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and participate in code reviews.

Requirements:
- 4+ years of backend development experience
- Proficiency in Python or Go
- Experience with AWS, Kubernetes, and Docker
- Strong understanding of REST APIs and gRPC
- B.Tech / M.Tech in Computer Science or related field

Benefits: Medical insurance, 30 days PTO, ESOPs, flexible work-from-home policy.
Apply at: careers.infosys.com | hr.pune@infosys.com

title: Data Analyst – Growth Analytics
description:
Swiggy's Growth Analytics team is hiring a Data Analyst to derive insights that drive user acquisition and retention strategies.

What you'll do:
- Build dashboards using Tableau and Metabase
- Write complex SQL queries against our Redshift warehouse
- Partner with product and marketing on A/B test design
- Present findings to senior leadership weekly

What we need:
- 2+ years in analytics or data science
- Expert SQL skills; Python (pandas) is a plus
- Experience with BI tools
- Strong communication skills

CTC: ₹10–16 LPA + performance bonus
Apply via LinkedIn or talent@swiggy.in

title: Product Manager – Fintech
description:
Razorpay is seeking an experienced Product Manager to lead our Payment Gateway product line. You will own the roadmap, write PRDs, and work with engineering and design to ship features that serve 8M+ businesses.

Responsibilities:
- Define and prioritize product roadmap based on data and customer feedback
- Coordinate with compliance, risk, and engineering teams
- Drive 0-to-1 feature launches end-to-end

Requirements:
- 4–7 years of product management experience
- Deep understanding of payments, UPI, or fintech ecosystem
- MBA / B.Tech from a top-tier institute preferred

Compensation: ₹25–40 LPA + ESOPs
Contact: careers@razorpay.com | razorpay.com/careers

title: HR Executive – Talent Acquisition
description:
Wipro Technologies is hiring an HR Executive for Talent Acquisition to support end-to-end recruitment across IT and non-IT roles.

Key Responsibilities:
- Source candidates through job portals, LinkedIn, and referrals
- Coordinate interviews with hiring managers
- Manage offer letters and onboarding
- Maintain MIS reports using Excel

Eligibility:
- MBA in HR or equivalent
- 1–3 years of recruitment experience
- Good communication skills in English and Telugu

Salary: ₹4–6 LPA + PF + Health Insurance
Email CV to: talent.hyd@wipro.com

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Freshworks is looking for a DevOps Engineer to strengthen our infrastructure reliability and CI/CD pipelines for SaaS products serving global customers.

Responsibilities:
- Manage and scale AWS infrastructure using Terraform
- Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions)
- Implement observability using Datadog and PagerDuty
- Collaborate with development teams on release management

Requirements:
- 3+ years in DevOps/SRE roles
- Strong AWS, Linux, Kubernetes skills
- Scripting in Bash or Python

Package: ₹12–22 LPA + Stock options
Apply: jobs.freshworks.com

title: Content Writer – B2B SaaS
description:
Zoho Corporation is looking for a Content Writer to create long-form blog posts, whitepapers, and case studies for our CRM and marketing automation products.

Responsibilities:
- Write 2–3 SEO-optimized articles per week
- Research industry trends and translate them into reader-friendly content
- Collaborate with product marketing on campaign assets

Requirements:
- 2+ years of B2B content writing experience
- Familiarity with SEO tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush)
- Excellent written English

CTC: ₹5–9 LPA
Apply at: zoho.com/careers or content-hiring@zoho.com
